title: HoloMon [Cobblemon]
description: HoloMon is an addon adding new Pokémon inspired by pet and companion of Hololive Vtuber
body:
HoloMon

is an addon focusing on adding new Pokémon inspired by pet and companion of Hololive Vtuber, currently there are 21 Pokémon that you can find Friend : Spawn in Spooky Biome\ Boros : Spawn in a Cave\ Mr.Squeak : Spawn in Badland\ Nemu : Spawn in Magical forest\ Bloop : Spawn in Ocean\ Death Sensei : Spawn in Soul sand Valley\ Takodachi : Spawn in The End (Near End City)\ Yatagarasu : Spawn in The End\ Bubba : Spawn in Village (increase rate in plain biome)\ Kotori : Spawn on the Moutain\ Bloom & Gloom : Spawn in Magical Biome & Nether\ Poyoyo : Spawn in Floral Biome\ Oryanke(fubuki) : Spawn in Snowy Biome\ Nousagi : Spawn in lushcave (increase rate near farm land)\ 35p : Spawn in Magical Biome (if there are lava nearby the rate increase) Daifuku : Spawn in Ice Spike Biome\ Nekko : Spawn in Jungle\ SSRB : Spawn in Dripstone Cave (increase rate near Target Block)\ Zain-kun : Spawn in Desert Pero : Spawn in Moutain NOW INCLUDING THE SMOL TALENT! Gwar Gura : Spawn in Ocean\ Ceres Fauna : Spawn in Magical forest\ Nanashi Mumei : Spawn in Spooky Biome\ Ouro Kronii : Spawn in a Cave\ Hakos baelz : Spawn in Desert\ Irys : Spawn in Magical forest or Deepdark\ Mori Calliope : Spawn in Soulsand Vally\ Oryanke evolve into Miteiru at level 50 while holding diamond pickaxe in Snowy Taiga biome\ Miteiru evolve into Fubuzilla at level 80 with friendship over 200 Nousagi can evolve into NousagII(attack form that swap it SP.Attck and Attack stats) by giving it a carrot ps. If Ad Astra mod is installed Takodachi can also be found on the Moon and Yatagarasu can be found on Mars Some Pokemon might not very well balance (i'm not that good with competitive pokemon) you can change the move set or stats as you wish before putting on a server. and if you have any suggestion or move set that would fit the Pokemon you can dm me on discord or post the suggestion here https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1109078835699388416 Thanks for https://twitter.com/MiLKY_Produx for Pero texturing There will be more to come later down the line
